ssrDemo.heading: Server-Side Rendering Demo
ssrDemo.description: This page demonstrates how Next.js renders components on the server. Green badges indicate server-rendered content; blue badges appear after client-side hydration.

legend.title: How to read the badges
legend.server: Server Component — rendered at request time on the server. Timestamp is baked into the HTML.
legend.client: Client Component — hydrated in the browser after the initial HTML is delivered.

wsDemo.heading: WebSocket / SignalR Demo
